displeased.def: 不快的、生氣的人的人 (或物) (氣)
displeased.ex: She was very displeased with him.

displeasing.def: 令人不快的、討厭的人 (或物) (厭)
displeasing.ex: It was a very displeasing event.

displeasure.def: 不快、生氣、厭煩人物 (單數) (氣)

disposable.def: 一次性的、可動用的、拋棄式的人的人物 (單數) (用)
disposable.col: disposable income, disposable camera, disposable diaper

disposal.def: 處置、處理、佈置、支配人物 (單數) (處)
disposal.col: at your disposal, waste disposal, bomb disposal

dispose.def: 處置、處理、配置、使傾向於的人的人

disposed.def: 證願的、有傾向的人的人 (或物) (願)
disposed.col: well disposed to, feel disposed to
disposed.ex: I am not disposed to help him.

disposer.def: 處置者、處理器人物 (單數) (器)

disposition.def: 性情、傾向、配置、處置權人物 (單數) (性/處)
disposition.ex: She has a very sunny disposition.

dispossess.def: 剝奪、奪取、使失去(財產)的人的人
